arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the server certificate.

certificate_body.description: The actual content of the public key certificate.

certificate_chain.description: A list of certificates that make up the chain for the server certificate.

expiration_date.description: The date when the server certificate will expire.

id.description: The unique identifier of the server certificate.

name.description: The name assigned to the server certificate.

path.description: The path to the server certificate in IAM.

upload_date.description: The date when the server certificate was uploaded.
